# ── Plot images (generated by plot_results_part2.py) ────────
# Copy from:  part2/results_part2/<filename>
# Upload to:  Overleaf root (same level as report_part2.tex)

results_part2/fig_p2_accuracy_vs_K.pdf        → fig_p2_accuracy_vs_K.pdf
results_part2/fig_p2_summary_bar.pdf          → fig_p2_summary_bar.pdf
results_part2/fig_p2_atoms_comparison_K8.pdf  → fig_p2_atoms_comparison_K8.pdf
results_part2/fig_p2_atoms_comparison_K4.pdf  → fig_p2_atoms_comparison_K4.pdf   (optional)
results_part2/fig_p2_pre_vs_adapted.pdf       → fig_p2_pre_vs_adapted.pdf

# ── Notes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
# 1. The report uses \includegraphics with filenames exactly as listed above
#    (no path prefix), so all files must be in the Overleaf project root.
# 2. After uploading plots, fill in the placeholder values [XX.X], [YY.Y],
#    [ZZ.Z], [WW.W], [UU.U] in report_part2.tex with your actual results
#    from results_part2/adaptation_results.json and
#    results_part2/baseline_results.json.
# 3. Also fill in Table 3 (tab:vs_K) with the full K-sweep numbers from
#    results_part2/svhn_direct_results.json and
#    results_part2/adaptation_results.json.
# 4. No external .bib file is needed — bibliography is embedded.
